case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JORGE ERNESTO TREJO CONTRERAS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $706.45 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TREJO CONTRERAS, JORGE ERNESTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF APR-26-2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY (REPRESENTATIVE SOSEFINA FLORES), PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT GRANTED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TREJO CONTRERAS, JORGE ERNESTO $521.45 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $626.45 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 110.00 - SERVED AUG-13-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TREJO CONTRERAS, JORGE ERNESTO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-08-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOSEFINA FLORES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
ORDER CONTINUED TO APRIL 26, 2019 AT 8:30AM FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TREJO CONTRERAS, JORGE ERNESTO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-26-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC'S REPRESENTATIVE: PRISCILLA TOVAR. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, JORGE ERNESTO TREJO CONTRERAS WITH ASSISTANCE FROM COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER: JEAN GARASCIA. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY $556.45 (NO COURT COSTS) IN INSTALLMENTS OF $33.00 STARTING JANUARY 11, 2019, AND EVERY 2 WEEKS AFTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE CHRISTINE VAN AKEN, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
